name: CenterCalculus
summary: Class to calculate the center of an object

methods.name: Calculate(line: Line2D) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D line
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D line

params.name: line
params.doc: Line2D on which to calculate the center

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise

methods.name: Calculate(line: Line3D) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 3D line
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 3D line

params.name: line
params.doc: Line3D on which to calculate the center

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise

methods.name: Calculate(polyline: Polyline2D, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D polyline
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D polyline

params.name: polyline
params.doc: Polyline on which to calculate the center.

params.name: edge
params.doc: Index of the segment to calculate the center on. Set to 0 to calculate the center of the entire polyline.

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise

methods.name: Calculate(polyline: Polyline3D, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 3D polyline
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 3D polyline

params.name: polyline
params.doc: Polyline on which to calculate the center.

params.name: edge
params.doc: Index of the segment to calculate the center on. Set to 0 to calculate the center of the entire polyline.

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise

methods.name: Calculate(polygon: Polygon2D, bPlaneCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.signature: Calculate(polygon: Polygon2D, bPlaneCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D polygon.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D polygon.

params.name: polygon
params.doc: Polygon on which to calculate the center

params.name: bPlaneCenter
params.doc: Whether to calculate the center of the area bounded by the polygon (True) or the center of the outline polyline (False)

params.name: edge
params.doc: When bPlaneCenter is set to False, this is the index of the segment of the outline polyline to calculate the center on. Set to 0 to calculate the center of the entire outline polyline.

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(polygon: Polygon3D, bPlaneCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.signature: Calculate(polygon: Polygon3D, bPlaneCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 3D polygon.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 3D polygon.

params.name: polygon
params.doc: Polygon on which to calculate the center

params.name: bPlaneCenter
params.doc: Whether to calculate the center of the area bounded by the polygon (True) or the center of the outline polyline (False)

params.name: edge
params.doc: When bPlaneCenter is set to False, this is the index of the segment of the outline polyline to calculate the center on. Set to 0 to calculate the center of the entire outline polyline.

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(arc: Arc2D, center: bool) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D arc.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D arc.

params.name: arc
params.doc: arc on which to calculate the center

params.name: center
params.doc: Whether to calculate the arc's midpoint, that divides the arc into two halves (True) or the arc's center (False)

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(arc: Arc3D, center: bool) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 3D arc.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 3D arc.

params.name: arc
params.doc: arc on which to calculate the center

params.name: center
params.doc: Whether to calculate the arc's midpoint, that divides the arc into two halves (True) or the arc's center (False)

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(spline: Spline2D, eps: float) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D spline.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D spline.

params.name: spline
params.doc: Spline on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(spline: Spline3D, eps: float) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 3D spline.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 3D spline.

params.name: spline
params.doc: Spline on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(spline: BSpline3D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple
methods.signature: Calculate(spline: BSpline3D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 3D base spline.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 3D base spline.

params.name: spline
params.doc: B-spline on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

params.name: bAreaCenter
params.doc: In case of a closed b-spline: whether to calculate the center of the area bounded by the B-spline (True) or the center of the b-spline curve (False)

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(spline: BSpline2D, eps: float) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D base spline.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D base spline.

params.name: spline
params.doc: B-spline on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(clothoid: Clothoid2D, eps: float) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D clothoid.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D clothoid.

params.name: clothoid
params.doc: clothoid on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(path: Path2D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple
methods.signature: Calculate(path: Path2D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D path.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D path.

params.name: path
params.doc: Path on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

params.name: bAreaCenter
params.doc: In case of a closed path: whether to calculate the center of the area bounded by the path (True) or the center of the path itself (False)

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(path: Path3D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple
methods.signature: Calculate(path: Path3D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 3D path.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 3D path.

params.name: path
params.doc: Path on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

params.name: bAreaCenter
params.doc: In case of a closed path: whether to calculate the center of the area bounded by the path (True) or the center of the path itself (False)

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.

methods.name: Calculate(geoObject: object, eps: float, bArcCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.signature: Calculate(geoObject: object, eps: float, bArcCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a curve.
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a curve.

params.name: geoObject
params.doc: object on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for calculation

params.name: bArcCenter
params.doc: Whether to calculate the arc's midpoint, that divides the arc into two halves (True) or the arc's center (False)

params.name: edge
params.doc: For polyline and polygon: index of the segment to calculate the center on. Set to 0 to calculate the center of the entire polyline/polygon.

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise.
